Developer Notes

The website can now display the current status of the Motion Services Discord bot.

Frequently Asked Questions

Useful answers for server owners.

Does Motion have a free plan?

Yes. Core moderation, tickets, logging, economy, leveling, giveaways, and applications can remain free.

How does the Invite button work?

The Invite Motion button opens the direct bot authorization link configured at the top of script.js.

Can I change the premium price?

Yes. Edit the monthly and yearly values inside the JavaScript near the bottom of the file.

Does this website process real payments?

No. The upgrade button is a safe preview. Connect it to Stripe, Lemon Squeezy, or another payment provider only after setting up a real backend.

© 2026 Motion Services

Premium Checkout Preview

This demo does not charge money. Connect this button to your real payment provider later.
